creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Maintainer is committer.  Assign accordingly.

Can you update MAINTAINER to your FreeBSD.org address, so that Bugzilla can
auto-assign the port properly?

(In reply to Warner Losh from comment #1)
> This diff looks good to me, go ahead and commit it whenever you need.

I do not think that Greg has a commit bit yet.
